error.signature: Transition is not registered: current state 'unconfigured' goal state 'active'

verdict.summary: Lifecycle node transition attempted in wrong order. Must follow unconfigured->inactive->active sequence.

dead_ends.action: Call activate() directly from unconfigured state
dead_ends.why_fails: Lifecycle state machine requires configure->activate sequence; skipping configure is not allowed

dead_ends.action: Use regular Node class and fake lifecycle callbacks
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses lifecycle management integration with launch files and system managers

workarounds.action: Follow the lifecycle transition sequence: configure then activate
workarounds.how: ros2 lifecycle set /my_node configure && ros2 lifecycle set /my_node activate

workarounds.action: Use lifecycle launch events to trigger transitions automatically
